subject: ASAP: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Shopgrid (e-commerce) is looking for a senior Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:

  • Start: ASAP
  • Duration: 12 months
  • Location: Stockholm (on-site)
  • Rate: up to 975 SEK/h

Required tech:

  • Java

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Marcus Holm
IT Recruitment Specialist
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 70 234 56 78
